column1: These individuals are the primary "Champions" for Kivira because their performance is measured by how well they integrate mental health into traditional medical workflows.
VP of Integrated Care / Integrated Health
These titles care about Kivira’s ability to automate MEAT (Monitor, Evaluate, Assess, Treat) documentation and capture unbundled reimbursement like G0511.
Director of Risk Adjustment / V28 Strategy
Chief Financial Officer (CFO) — Focus on those at FQHCs or large physician groups.
Kivira’s value is highest in specialties with high behavioral acuity, such as Oncology or Orthopedics (especially with the TEAM model shift).
Director of Care Management / Care Coordination
Use these specific strings in the "Current Job Title" filter to isolate high-intent prospects:
The BHI Specialist: ("Behavioral Health" OR "Mental Health") AND ("Integration" OR "Director" OR "VP" OR "Operations")
The CoCM Strategist: ("Collaborative Care" OR "CoCM" OR "BHI" OR "Integrated Health")
The VBC/Risk Lead: ("Value Based Care" OR "VBC" OR "Risk Adjustment" OR "Population Health")
